rtx4090.label: beast-3
notes: Mac-side rlab-fleet manages Docker runner containers on this host.
Use 5 children with env_threads=4 for screening queues.
Use 3-4 children with env_threads=4 when individual latency or lower contention matters.

rtx2060.label: beast-2
notes: Mac-side rlab-fleet manages Docker runner containers on this host.
Use ssh -o HostKeyAlias=beast-2 tsilva@192.168.133.26 until hostname resolution is restored.
The local-8332822-dirty image tag is a legacy k3s/containerd artifact; use pushed immutable GHCR digest refs for Docker fleet jobs.

local-macbook.label: local MacBook
notes: Best for smoke tests, debugging, and playback rather than long PPO batches.
